tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Jag har fastnat i detaljer. Vad är viktigast just nu i projektet?
assertions: Reorients toward the goal of getting more or better leads to David
Asks or considers what is currently blocking the goal
Frames priorities by value per hour rather than technical elegance
Mentions what can wait or is secondary

tests.name: t2
assertions: Anchors the answer to the goal: David getting leads and selling batteries
Treats lead quality or quantity as the primary measure
